_meta.purpose: Adversarial regression data from the corpus-wide sweep (#134). The 4 must_not_cluster fixture negatives certify NOTHING: an evidence-primary mechanism scored 27/31 with ZERO fixture over-merges and 21 over-merges across 2922 real corpus pairs.
_meta.adjudication: EVERY entry is HAND-ADJUDICATED. An automated pass flagged 11 pairs as over-merges; manual review found THREE were genuine duplicates — including the Storonski pair that D2c exists to fix. Freezing those as negatives would have permanently locked in the bug. Nothing here is auto-classified.
_meta.rule: must_not_merge: a mechanism that merges ANY of these does not pass D6. true_duplicates_from_sweep: a mechanism that FAILS to merge these is losing real stories. ambiguous: a product decision, not a matcher detail.

must_not_merge.why: THE COACH AS A BRIDGE. Both mention Itoudis (Hapoel TA's coach). One is Storonski's arrival, the other is Bryant's contract extension. Different players, different events. A coach's name is a CLUB-level token, not a story-identifying anchor — required negative for D2b.

must_not_merge.why: THE FORMULAIC TEMPLATE — the dominant FP class, and the ONLY pair that SURVIVES CONTAINMENT (C=0.31, the same value at which Madar becomes reachable). Aaron Wheeler negotiating with Eilat vs Hapoel Holon negotiating with two other players. Different clubs, different players. Shared 'evidence' is במו"מ / בשיחות ('in negotiations') — which every negotiation story says. NO shared named subject. This is the pair that proves containment alone is not a sufficient mechanism.

true_duplicates_from_sweep.why: TRUE DUPLICATE, and the automated sweep called it an over-merge. Storonski IS Chris Jones's replacement — israel_hayom headlines the ROLE ('Chris Jones's replacement: EuroLeague star agreed with Hapoel TA') and names Storonski only in the subtitle. Note sport5 spells him סטרונסקי while ynet/israel_hayom spell him סטורנסקי — this is D2c's POSITIVE CONTROL. Any transliteration fix must merge these; any negative-freeze that blocks them is a bug.

true_duplicates_from_sweep.why: TRUE DUPLICATE. One man alone cancelled Balogun's red card at the World Cup — the same Times investigation, reported by walla and ynet 3.5h apart. 8 shared discriminative tokens (באלוגון, לבטל, הכרטיס, האדום…). Correctly merged by containment; the automated sweep mislabelled it.

articles.title: לבדו: זה האיש שקיבל את ההחלטה הכי שערורייתית במונדיאל
articles.subtitle: אדם אחד בלבד קיבל את ההחלטה לבטל את הכרטיס האדום של פולארין באלוגון, כך על פי בדיקה של העיתונאי הבריטי מרטין זיגלר מ"הטיימס". בוועדת המשמעת של פיפ"א ישנם 18 חברים, אך אף אחד מ-17 האחרים כלל לא דן בנושא.

articles.title: הפרשה שמסעירה את המונדיאל: כך התקבלה ההחלטה השנויה במחלוקת בפיפ"א
articles.subtitle: ללא הצבעה, ללא דיון משותף ובלי הסבר מפורט: ב"טיימס" הבריטי חושפים - כך קיבל אדם אחד בלבד את ההחלטה לבטל את הכרטיס האדום לפלוריאן באלוגון, אשר אפשרה לחלוץ נבחרת ארה"ב לשחק מול בלגיה

ambiguous.why: DELIBERATELY NOT FROZEN EITHER WAY. Same subject (Timoko Diarra) and same event thread (his Hapoel TA move collapsing), 12h apart — but the two reports CONTRADICT each other: israel_hayom says the Reds have not given up, walla says he will not sign and is close to Kasimpasa. Whether contradictory updates on one thread are one story or two is a PRODUCT decision, not a matcher detail. It must be decided in D2b/#123, not silently frozen here.
